---
name: Bug Report
about: Something isn't working as expected
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug

---

## Describe the bug
A clear description of what's going wrong.

## Steps to reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior
What should have happened instead.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain.

## Environment
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 120, Safari 17]
- Device: [e.g. Desktop, iPad, Android tablet]
- Screen size: [e.g. 1024x768]
